user.bio: Blank

comment.body:
Ok so, the question about pivot and bull bias...

the thing is that PS is literally coincidencing with the pivot. 
it isn't at round numbers as it usually is, but literally at the pivot.
If you take the geometric avg of the spread: sqrt(5945*5925)=5934.99
you get the zero speed lvl basically 
(these +/- 1 pts don't really matter at all here)
comment.raw_body:
